market.summary: Pre-market consolidation; KOSPI holding strong support at 5680; retail interest in domestic tech remains high ahead of open.

art.summary: Ammerman Center Triennial Symposium (Mar 26-28) focus on human-tech convergence. Art Basel HK reports steady engagement.

corporate.alert: Monitor volatility around 5,700; market sentiment shows consolidation post-rally, but retail interest remains robust.
